data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider visibility of completion status', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing completion percentages, there are no specific details or endpoints provided that confirm how this visibility is achieved. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of how provider visibility of completion status is implemented or accessed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for provider dashboard visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns completion status for tasks assigned to patients.
